summary: Capacity Calculator feature testing COMPLETE. All features verified working correctly. Zone Edit Dialog shows capacity calculator with 3 fields (area, per_person, max_capacity), auto-calculation works (1000÷0.9=1111), visual formula displayed. Density tab shows capacity as READ-ONLY text and current_count as editable input. Backend API accepts area_sqm and per_person_sqm fields.

capacity_calculator_section: Zone Edit Dialog shows 'حساب السعة' (Capacity Calculator) section with data-testid='capacity-calculator'
Section appears ONLY when session status is 'draft'
Section header shows Users icon and correct Arabic/English label
input_fields: Area input (المساحة) - data-testid='zone-area-input' - FOUND and working
Per Person input (نصيب الفرد) - data-testid='zone-perperson-input' - FOUND with default 0.8
Max Capacity input (السعة القصوى) - data-testid='zone-capacity-input' - FOUND and editable
auto_calculation: Entering area=1000 and per_person=0.9 auto-calculates max_capacity=1111 CORRECT
Manual override of max_capacity still works (can enter any value directly)
visual_formula: Formula display appears when area > 0 AND per_person > 0
Formula styled with colored badges (blue for area, green for per_person, amber for result)
save_functionality: Save sends area_sqm, per_person_sqm, max_capacity to backend API
Backend successfully persists all three fields
density_tab_capacity_readonly: Capacity column (السعة القصوى) shows as READ-ONLY text using <span> element
Area info appears below capacity when area_sqm > 0 (e.g., '1000 م²')
density_tab_current_count_editable: Current count column (العدد الحالي) uses <input> element
density-input-{id} is editable - successfully changed value from 0 to 500
Input highlights with ring when value changed
utilization_calculation: Utilization percentage calculated correctly: current_count / max_capacity * 100
backend_api_tests: Update zone area_sqm via API - PASS
Update zone per_person_sqm via API - PASS
Update zone max_capacity via API - PASS
Update all capacity fields together - PASS
Update zone current_count via API - PASS
Density batch update with current_count - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: Capacity Calculator implementation at lines 2292-2359 in DailySessionsPage.jsx is well structured
Auto-calculation logic correctly handles edge cases (pp > 0 && area > 0)
SessionZoneUpdate model at lines 696-713 in server.py correctly includes area_sqm and per_person_sqm as Optional fields
Density tab capacity display correctly uses <span> (read-only) vs <input> (editable current_count)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All capacity calculator features verified working

seed_data_creation: Used existing TEST-ZONE-1 on basement floor session for Feb 18, 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified the Capacity Calculator feature. Key data-testids: capacity-calculator, zone-area-input, zone-perperson-input, zone-capacity-input, capacity-formula, save-zone-changes, capacity-display-{id}, density-input-{id}. TEST-ZONE-1 now has area_sqm=1000, per_person_sqm=0.9, max_capacity=1111. The Density tab correctly shows capacity as read-only and current_count as editable.
